title.en: At this time, the Realm Ancestor and the War An...

content.en:
One by one, the ancestors left, and the crisis of the Xuanxu Ancestor Realm was naturally gone.

At this time, the Realm Ancestor and the War Ancestor had not yet left.

In fact, the Realm Ancestor and the War Ancestor were very curious about the promotion of the Xuanxu Saint Realm to the Xuanxu Ancestor Realm, of course, they did not directly ask about the secrets of the Xuanxu Ancestor Realm, but asked in a different way.

"Ten Thousand Laws Ancestor, the Xuanxu Saint Realm has been promoted to the Xuanxu Ancestor Realm, can this method be replicated?"

Jiezu asked.

If this method can be replicated, then the battle gate can create an ancestral realm.

In that case, how powerful the battle gate will become!

"It can't be copied!" Ye Tian replied: "Actually, this is a treasure that I obtained from the Dark Destruction Domain at the beginning, and it was integrated into the Xuanxu Saint Realm, which can make the Xuanxu Saint Realm promote to the Xuanxu Ancestral Realm!"

"Treasures obtained from the Dark Destruction Domain??"

Jiezu was shocked.

He didn't think that Ye Tian was lying, at Ye Tian's level, it was already the most powerful level in the Dark Forbidden Domain, so there was no need to lie.

And so, he believed.

"In this way, if the Ancestor of Destruction knew the truth, I am afraid that he would regret his death, and the treasures they didn't find were discovered by you!"

Zhan Zu laughed.

The three of them chatted for a long time before they dispersed.

In the following days, the news that the Xuanxu Saint Realm was being promoted to the Xuanxu Ancestor Realm spread, and it was also rumored that the Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws of the Human Race had the top ancestor combat power, and also had a clone, which was also the top ancestor combat power.

At this moment, the countless powerhouses of the Dark Sacred Domain, the Dark Destruction Domain, and the Dark Soul Domain were extremely shocked, and even the countless forces of the Eternal Sect and the Dark Forbidden Domain were shocked by Ye Tian's strength.

Some people even ranked Ye Tian in the ranks of the strongest people in the Dark Forbidden Domain, after all, Ye Tian's body and clone together, maybe their combat power surpassed that of the Holy Ancestor and the Destruction Ancestor.

Of course, there is no real fight, and no one knows who is strong and who is weak in each other's real strength.

What if the Ancestor of Destruction and the Holy Ancestor hide their strength?

That's not the thing!

In the blink of an eye, millions of years have passed.

On this day, the Xuanxu Saint Realm was finally completely promoted to the Xuanxu Ancestral Realm.

The Xuanxu Ancestral Realm had just been promoted, and a large number of rare resources and treasures had been born, and all of them belonged to the human race.

Moreover, Ye Tian only collected a part of the top resources of the Xuanxu Ancestral Realm, and the other resources were not touched, leaving it up to the cultivators of the human race to find it, whoever found it belonged to whomever it was, and no one was allowed to snatch it.

Even some weak people were lucky enough to obtain some treasures, and thus rose to the sky in one step.

Under such circumstances, the Terrans gave birth to many strong men and lucky geniuses.

Perhaps after a long time, the human race will give birth to more ancestors without superior domains.

Another period of time passed, and on this day, Ye Tian's copy body left the Xuanxu Ancestral Realm and began to wander around the Dark Forbidden Domain.

He's been an Ancestor for so long, and he's barely walked around the Dark Forbidden Realm, and he really doesn't know much about the Dark Forbidden Realm.

Therefore, this time he plans to learn more about the Dark Forbidden Realm.

This walk, he found that the Dark Forbidden Domain was really too big, far beyond his imagination, if he didn't use the ability of the Ancestor - to travel through time and space, just by flying, even the Ancestor, if he wanted to cross the entire Dark Forbidden Domain, I am afraid it would take millions of years.

It is really strange that there are only three dark holy places in the huge Dark Forbidden Realm so far.

Moreover, there are some places in the Dark Forbidden Realm that even the Ancestors dare not enter.

For example, this forbidden place in front of Ye Tian.

At this time, Ye Tian stood in front of a black giant mountain, this mountain was located in the void of the Dark Forbidden Domain, the black mountain giant mountain was equivalent to the volume of a holy realm, and it brought a very dangerous aura to Ye Tian, as if he would fall if he entered.

"What is this place?"

Ye Tian was very curious, so he didn't go in as soon as possible, but contacted the Realm Ancestor.

"Realm Ancestor, I found a black giant mountain in the Dark Forbidden Realm, what is this place?"

Ye Tian asked.

Soon, the incarnation of the ancestor of the realm ancestor shuttled through time and space, came to Ye Tian's side, looked at the black giant mountain in front of him with great fear, and said: "This is the Calamity Black Mountain, the ancestor will fall when he enters, it is said that it is known that there are a total of three ancestors who have entered the Calamity Black Mountain, two of them fell directly, and the other one is the elite ancestor, and it fell not long after it came out, and it was already crazy when it came out, and it can make the ancestor crazy, you can imagine what a terrifying thing it encountered." Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws, although you have a clone, I suggest that you still don't go, some attacks even ignore the connection between the clone and the body, and directly bombard the deity. The ancestors also have the incarnation of the ancestor, and the combat power is still very terrifying, but still no one dares to use the incarnation of the ancestor to enter the Calamity Black Mountain, just worried about this problem. "

Ye Tian also knew that copying the body could not be omnipotent, so he was not reckless, otherwise he would not have asked the Realm Ancestor.

At this time, the Realm Ancestor continued, "There are currently six places in the Dark Forbidden Realm that are forbidden places for the Ancestors, and even the top Ancestors dare not enter them. There are still dozens of places where ordinary ancestors will fall if they enter, and the top ancestors have a certain chance of survival. "

Subsequently, the Realm Ancestor forbade the six true Ancestors to speak.

Calamity Black Mountain, Destruction Swamp, Boundless Wall, Sky Sword Tomb, Illusory Dream Realm, Boundless Demon Sea.

These six forbidden places can be called the tombs of ancestors, and many ancestors have been buried.

Before the birth of the first Dark Sanctuary, the Dark Destruction Domain, the Dark Forbidden Domain actually gave birth to the first batch of the oldest ancestors, and most of these oldest ancestors fell in these six forbidden places.

Some of the ancestors have also disappeared, and no one knows where they went.

Some say that he sealed himself and fell into a deep sleep, while others speculate that he left the Dark Forbidden Realm.

When the Realm Ancestor said to leave the Dark Forbidden Domain, Ye Tian was stunned and couldn't help asking: "Isn't the Dark Forbidden Domain everything, can you still leave the Dark Forbidden Domain?"

"I don't know!" the Realm Ancestor shook his head, "It is rumored that every long time, an illusory portal will appear in the Dark Forbidden Realm, and once the Ancestor enters the illusory dream, it will disappear completely. It is said that this illusory portal is a passage to another world, but this is a rumor, and no ancestor has ever returned. We ancestors lived forever, and we would not think of leaving unless there was really no progress at all. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian nodded.

He originally thought that he had broken through to the top Ancestor combat power, and the Dark Forbidden Domain would have no secret for him, but he didn't expect the secret to be even greater.
